items.title: Why Your PHP Form Is Not Working — 5 Common Bugs Fixed
items.description:
💡 TL;DR

A broken PHP form almost always comes down to one of five things: wrong method attribute, a mismatched name on your input, checking $_POST with the wrong key, a form that isn't actually submitting, or output sent before a header()</

items.title: citefid 0.1.0: verificar la fidelidad de citas en wikis OKF con NLI (AUC 0.7029 sobre código)
items.description:
citefid 0.1.0: verificar la fidelidad de citas en wikis OKF con NLI (AUC 0.70 sobre código)

Los generadores de wikis OKF comprueban que la cita existe, no que su contenido respalde la afirmación. citefid cierra esa brecha: verifica fidelidad, no existencia.

items.title: translateZ()
items.description: The translateZ() function moves an element closer to or farther from the user. translateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

items.title: translateY()
items.description: The translateY() function shifts an element vertically by the specified amount. translateY() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.
